Title: One Time Payment
Content:
Payment Sessions allow you to securely collect a payment from your customer during checkout. This feature ensures regulatory compliance and provides a smooth, hosted payment experience through Xendit’s checkout page. It’s a common flow to accept one-time payments with a simple integration.

Example usage:

  • eCommerce checkout: Collect immediate payment from customers when placing an order.

  • Service booking: Confirm a reservation only after successful payment.

How to integrate

  1. During checkout or whenever your customer is ready to make a one-time purchase, your system should Create a Payment Session with Xendit using the example payload provided below.

Request - POST /sessions

{
    "reference_id": "{{$YOUR_REFERENCE_ID}}",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "PAYMENT_LINK",
    "amount": 150000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "{{$randomUUID}}",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "customer@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+628123456789",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "John",
            "surname": "Doe"
        }
    },
    "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/complete",
    "cancel_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/cancel"
}

Response - POST /sessions

{
    "payment_session_id": "ps-67527107dda8b2513acdaef0",
    "created": "2024-12-06T03:35:36.032Z",
    "updated": "2024-12-06T03:35:36.032Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "b767f88f-b5bc-4836-9c47-c14261909dec",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 150000,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "cust-fe8743c3-f554-4d25-a0e9-9980226c4b1b",
    "expires_at": "2024-12-06T04:05:35.049Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "PAYMENT_LINK",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/complete",
    "cancel_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/cancel",
    "payment_link_url": "https://dev.xen.to/qZx5RD_7"
}

  1. Once the Payment Session is created, redirect your end user to the Xendit-hosted checkout page using the payment_link_url from the response.

  2. Your customer will complete the payment on the Xendit-hosted page using their preferred payment channel (e.g., cards, eWallets, bank transfer, QR, etc.).

  3. Upon successful payment, Xendit will send a payment_session.completed webhook to your system. You should use these webhooks to update the order status in your system. Optionally you can also handle webhook of payment.capture to see the payment details. Both webhook has the correlation of payment_id.

Title: Pembayaran Sekali
Content:
Payment Sessions memungkinkan Anda untuk menagih pembayaran dari pelanggan Anda secara aman selama proses checkout. Fitur ini memastikan kepatuhan terhadap peraturan dan menyediakan pengalaman pembayaran yang lancar dan di-host melalui halaman checkout Xendit. Ini adalah alur umum untuk menerima pembayaran sekali jalan dengan integrasi yang sederhana.

Contoh penggunaan:

  • Checkout eCommerce: Tagih pembayaran langsung dari pelanggan saat melakukan pemesanan.

  • Pemesanan layanan: Konfirmasi reservasi hanya setelah pembayaran berhasil.

Cara berintegrasi

  1. Selama checkout atau kapan pun pelanggan Anda siap melakukan pembelian sekali jalan, sistem Anda harus Membuat Payment Session dengan Xendit menggunakan contoh payload yang disediakan di bawah ini.

Request - POST /sessions

{
    "reference_id": "{{$YOUR_REFERENCE_ID}}",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "PAYMENT_LINK",
    "amount": 150000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "{{$randomUUID}}",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "customer@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+628123456789",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "John",
            "surname": "Doe"
        }
    },
    "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/complete",
    "cancel_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/cancel"
}

Response - POST /sessions

{
    "payment_session_id": "ps-67527107dda8b2513acdaef0",
    "created": "2024-12-06T03:35:36.032Z",
    "updated": "2024-12-06T03:35:36.032Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "b767f88f-b5bc-4836-9c47-c14261909dec",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 150000,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "cust-fe8743c3-f554-4d25-a0e9-9980226c4b1b",
    "expires_at": "2024-12-06T04:05:35.049Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "PAYMENT_LINK",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/complete",
    "cancel_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/cancel",
    "payment_link_url": "https://dev.xen.to/qZx5RD_7"
}

  1. Setelah Payment Session dibuat, arahkan pengguna akhir Anda ke halaman checkout yang di-host oleh Xendit menggunakan payment_link_url dari respons.

  2. Pelanggan Anda akan menyelesaikan pembayaran di halaman yang di-host oleh Xendit menggunakan saluran pembayaran pilihan mereka (misalnya, kartu, eWallet, transfer bank, QR, dll.).

  3. Setelah pembayaran berhasil, Xendit akan mengirimkan webhook payment.capture atau payment.failed ke sistem Anda. Anda harus menggunakan webhook ini untuk memperbarui status pesanan di sistem Anda.

Title: การชำระเงินครั้งเดียว
Content:
Payment Sessions ช่วยให้คุณสามารถรวบรวมการชำระเงินจากลูกค้าได้อย่างปลอดภัยในระหว่างการชำระเงิน (checkout) ฟีเจอร์นี้รับรองการปฏิบัติตามกฎระเบียบและมอบประสบการณ์การชำระเงินที่ราบรื่นและโฮสต์โดย Xendit ผ่านหน้าชำระเงินของ Xendit เป็นขั้นตอนทั่วไปในการรับชำระเงินแบบครั้งเดียวด้วยการผสานรวมที่ง่ายดาย

ตัวอย่างการใช้งาน:

  • eCommerce checkout: รวบรวมการชำระเงินทันทีจากลูกค้าเมื่อทำการสั่งซื้อ

  • Service booking: ยืนยันการจองหลังจากชำระเงินสำเร็จเท่านั้น

วิธีการผสานรวม

  1. ในระหว่างการชำระเงิน หรือเมื่อใดก็ตามที่ลูกค้าของคุณพร้อมที่จะทำการซื้อแบบครั้งเดียว ระบบของคุณควร สร้าง Payment Session กับ Xendit โดยใช้ตัวอย่าง payload ที่ให้ไว้ด้านล่าง

Request - POST /sessions

{
    "reference_id": "{{$YOUR_REFERENCE_ID}}",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "PAYMENT_LINK",
    "amount": 150000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "{{$randomUUID}}",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "customer@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+628123456789",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "John",
            "surname": "Doe"
        }
    },
    "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/complete",
    "cancel_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/cancel"
}

Response - POST /sessions

{
    "payment_session_id": "ps-67527107dda8b2513acdaef0",
    "created": "2024-12-06T03:35:36.032Z",
    "updated": "2024-12-06T03:35:36.032Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "b767f88f-b5bc-4836-9c47-c14261909dec",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 150000,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "cust-fe8743c3-f554-4d25-a0e9-9980226c4b1b",
    "expires_at": "2024-12-06T04:05:35.049Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "PAYMENT_LINK",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/complete",
    "cancel_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/cancel",
    "payment_link_url": "https://dev.xen.to/qZx5RD_7"
}

  1. เมื่อสร้าง Payment Session แล้ว ให้เปลี่ยนเส้นทางผู้ใช้ปลายทางของคุณไปยัง หน้าชำระเงินที่โฮสต์โดย Xendit โดยใช้ payment_link_url จาก response

  2. ลูกค้าของคุณจะดำเนินการชำระเงินให้เสร็จสมบูรณ์บนหน้าเพจที่โฮสต์โดย Xendit โดยใช้ช่องทางการชำระเงินที่ต้องการ (เช่น cards, eWallets, bank transfer, QR, เป็นต้น)

  3. เมื่อชำระเงินสำเร็จ Xendit จะส่ง webhook payment.capture หรือ payment.failed ไปยังระบบของคุณ คุณควรใช้ webhooks เหล่านี้เพื่ออัปเดตสถานะคำสั่งซื้อในระบบของคุณ
SeoTitle: การชำระเงินครั้งเดียว

Title: Pago Único
Content:
Las Payment Sessions le permiten cobrar un pago de forma segura a su cliente durante el proceso de pago (checkout). Esta característica asegura el cumplimiento normativo y proporciona una experiencia de pago fluida y alojada a través de la página de pago de Xendit. Es un flujo común para aceptar pagos únicos con una integración sencilla.

Ejemplo de uso:

  • Proceso de pago de eCommerce: Cobrar el pago inmediato a los clientes al realizar un pedido.

  • Reserva de servicio: Confirmar una reserva solo después de un pago exitoso.

Cómo integrar

  1. Durante el proceso de pago (checkout) o cuando su cliente esté listo para realizar una compra única, su sistema debe Crear una Payment Session con Xendit usando el payload de ejemplo proporcionado a continuación.

Request - POST /sessions

{
    "reference_id": "{{$YOUR_REFERENCE_ID}}",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "PAYMENT_LINK",
    "amount": 150000,
    "currency": "IDR",
    "country": "ID",
    "customer": {
        "reference_id": "{{$randomUUID}}",
        "type": "INDIVIDUAL",
        "email": "customer@yourdomain.com",
        "mobile_number": "+628123456789",
        "individual_detail": {
            "given_names": "John",
            "surname": "Doe"
        }
    },
    "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/complete",
    "cancel_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/cancel"
}

Response - POST /sessions

{
    "payment_session_id": "ps-67527107dda8b2513acdaef0",
    "created": "2024-12-06T03:35:36.032Z",
    "updated": "2024-12-06T03:35:36.032Z",
    "status": "ACTIVE",
    "reference_id": "b767f88f-b5bc-4836-9c47-c14261909dec",
    "currency": "IDR",
    "amount": 150000,
    "country": "ID",
    "customer_id": "cust-fe8743c3-f554-4d25-a0e9-9980226c4b1b",
    "expires_at": "2024-12-06T04:05:35.049Z",
    "session_type": "PAY",
    "mode": "PAYMENT_LINK",
    "locale": "en",
    "business_id": "62440e322008e87fb29c1fd0",
    "success_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/complete",
    "cancel_return_url": "https://yourcompany.com/order/cancel",
    "payment_link_url": "https://dev.xen.to/qZx5RD_7"
}

  1. Una vez que se crea la Payment Session, redirija a su usuario final a la página de pago alojada por Xendit usando el payment_link_url de la response.

  2. Su cliente completará el pago en la página alojada por Xendit usando su canal de pago preferido (ej., tarjetas, E-Wallets, transferencia bancaria, QR, etc.).

  3. Tras un pago exitoso, Xendit enviará un payment.capture o payment.failed webhook a su sistema. Usted debe usar estos webhooks para actualizar el estado del pedido en su sistema.
